summary: Iteration 124: Tested characters_in_scene feature for scene editing in DirectedStudio. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Character toggle chips appear in edit mode, selection/deselection works, save persists correctly, view mode shows gold chips with user icon.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: POST /api/studio/projects/{project_id}/update-scene correctly includes 'characters_in_scene' in allowed keys (line 1025 in production.py)
Backend: characters_in_scene field persists correctly after update - verified via GET /status
Frontend: Scene edit form includes character toggle chips (lines 1422-1458 in DirectedStudio.jsx)
Frontend: Toggle chips use data-testid='scene-char-toggle-{scene_number}-{char_name}' for testing
Frontend: Selected characters shown in gold (bg-[#C9A84C]/15 border-[#C9A84C]/40 text-[#C9A84C])
Frontend: Unselected characters shown in gray (bg-[#111] border-[#333] text-[#666])
Frontend: View mode displays characters_in_scene as gold chips with Users icon (lines 1473-1481)
Frontend: Empty state message shown when no characters defined yet
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project 1a0779dd0ce7 (ADAO E EVA BIBLIZOO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 124 complete. characters_in_scene feature fully verified. Test credentials: test@agentflow.com / password123. Test project: 1a0779dd0ce7 (ADAO E EVA BIBLIZOO - 15 scenes, 4 characters: Adão, Eva, A Serpente, Deus (Voz)). The feature allows users to select/deselect which characters appear in each scene via toggle chips in the scene edit form (Step 1 - Roteiro). Characters are displayed as gold chips in view mode.

backend_tests.test_update_scene_with_characters_in_sce: PASS - Scene 2 updated with characters, persisted correctly
backend_tests.test_update_scene_remove_characters: PASS - Scene 3 characters cleared to empty array
backend_tests.test_update_scene_with_all_fields: PASS - All fields including characters_in_scene persisted

frontend_tests.project_loads: PASS - ADAO E EVA BIBLIZOO loaded
frontend_tests.character_selection_state: PASS - Adão and Eva were selected (gold), A Serpente and Deus (Voz) unselected (gray)
frontend_tests.save_button_works: PASS - Save button clicked, 'Cena atualizada!' toast shown
frontend_tests.persistence_verified: PASS - Scene 1 now has only ['Eva'] after deselecting Adão

features_verified.backend_characters_in_scene_persists: VERIFIED - Field persists correctly after update
features_verified.frontend_character_toggle_chips_in_edit_: VERIFIED - Toggle chips appear when editing a scene
